name: South Street Crab Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 lb jumbo lump crab meat picked over
A few drops of Tabasco sauce
2 tablespoons fresh flat-leafed parsley leaves, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and celery in 4 tablespoons butter over moderately low heat until tender. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Stir in crab meat and bread crumbs.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, Old Bay seasoning, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco, parsley, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir the mixture into the crab mixture until well combined.
5. Form crab mixture into 6 flattened rounds, each about 3 inches wide and 3/4 inch thick.
6. Transfer to a baking sheet lined with wax paper and chill at least 1 hour, up to 4 hours.
7. In a heavy skillet, cook half of the crab cakes in 1 tablespoon butter until golden brown, about 2 to 3 minutes on each side.
8. Cook remaining crab cakes in the remaining butter in the same manner.
9. Serve crab cakes warm with lemon wedges. Makes 6 crab cakes, serving 3 as a main course or 6 as a first course.
